fr: :[name=???]:Salut Maker, et bienvenue dans la démo technique de CritterSDK !
en: :[name=???]:Hello and welcome to the Dungeon Critters Demo!:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=???]:Hello Maker, and welcome to the CritterSDK Technical Demo!
de: :[name=???]:Hello Maker, and welcome to the CritterSDK Technical Demo!
ko: :[name=???]:Hello Maker, and welcome to the CritterSDK Technical Demo!
kana: :[name=???]:Hello Maker, and welcome to the CritterSDK Technical Demo!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Je suis SirMalo,[WAIT 40] et voici mes collègues Aerun,[WAIT 100] Nuri Yuri,[WAIT 100] Palbolsky,[WAIT 100] Rey,[WAIT 100] et Walven ![WAIT 100]
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Ah... you're awake. Good. I was beginning to wonder if you would. I am Elder Theodrin.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:I am SirMalo,[WAIT 40] and here are my workmates Aerun,[WAIT 100] Nuri Yuri,[WAIT 100] Palbolsky,[WAIT 100] Rey,[WAIT 100] and Walven![WAIT 100]
de: :[name=SirMalo]:I am SirMalo,[WAIT 40] and here are my workmates Aerun,[WAIT 100] Nuri Yuri,[WAIT 100] Palbolsky,[WAIT 100] Rey,[WAIT 100] and Walven![WAIT 100]
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Ah... ya despertó. Bien. Empezaba a pensar que no lo haría. Soy el anciano Theodrin.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:I am SirMalo,[WAIT 40] and here are my workmates Aerun,[WAIT 100] Nuri Yuri,[WAIT 100] Palbolsky,[WAIT 100] Rey,[WAIT 100] and Walven![WAIT 100]
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:I am SirMalo,[WAIT 40] and here are my workmates Aerun,[WAIT 100] Nuri Yuri,[WAIT 100] Palbolsky,[WAIT 100] Rey,[WAIT 100] and Walven![WAIT 100]

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Cette démo technique est le fruit de notre collaboration continuelle et du chemin parcouru depuis la première release de CritterSDK.
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:I found you unconscious on the outskirts of Holtheim.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:This technical demo is the result of our continued collaboration and shows how far we've come since the first release of CritterSDK.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:This technical demo is the result of our continued collaboration and shows how far we've come since the first release of CritterSDK.
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Lo encontré inconsciente en las afueras de Holtheim.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:This technical demo is the result of our continued collaboration and shows how far we've come since the first release of CritterSDK.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:This technical demo is the result of our continued collaboration and shows how far we've come since the first release of CritterSDK.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Bien entendu, CritterSDK ne serait jamais arrivé jusqu'à ce niveau sans les divers contributeurs qui ont tous apporté leur pierre à l'édifice !
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:You are not from this village. That much is clear.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Of course, CritterSDK would never have reached this level without all the contributors who played their part!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Of course, CritterSDK would never have reached this level without all the contributors who played their part!
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:No es de esta aldea. Eso está claro.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Of course, CritterSDK would never have reached this level without all the contributors who played their part!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Of course, CritterSDK would never have reached this level without all the contributors who played their part!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Pour ce qui est de cette démo, elle te permettra d'essayer en jeu les différents systèmes que nous offrons avec CritterSDK.
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:No pack, no tools... and not a single Critter at your side.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:As far as this demo is concerned, it will let you test the different systems we offer with CritterSDK ingame.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:As far as this demo is concerned, it will let you test the different systems we offer with CritterSDK ingame.
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Sin mochila, sin herramientas... y ni un solo Critter con usted.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:As far as this demo is concerned, it will let you test the different systems we offer with CritterSDK ingame.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:As far as this demo is concerned, it will let you test the different systems we offer with CritterSDK ingame.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Mais elle est aussi en lien avec Critter Studio, et elle te permettra de voir comment ces fonctionnalités sont implémentées.
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:That is... unusual for someone found this deep in the Highgrove Strata.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:But it is also connected with Critter Studio, and it will let you see how these features are implemented.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:But it is also connected with Critter Studio, and it will let you see how these features are implemented.
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Es... inusual para alguien encontrado tan adentro del estrato Highgrove.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:But it is also connected with Critter Studio, and it will let you see how these features are implemented.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:But it is also connected with Critter Studio, and it will let you see how these features are implemented.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tu arriveras sous peu sur l'Île, une collection de maps sur lesquelles tu pourras te balader et expérimenter.
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Tell me... who are you?:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:You will soon arrive on the Island, a collection of maps on which you will be able to explore and experiment on.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:You will soon arrive on the Island, a collection of maps on which you will be able to explore and experiment on.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:You will soon arrive on the Island, a collection of maps on which you will be able to explore and experiment on.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:You will soon arrive on the Island, a collection of maps on which you will be able to explore and experiment on.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Je te conseille de d'abord te rendre à la Tour, ça sera le début de ton parcours dans cette démo.\nlQuelqu'un t'y attend.
en: Left
it: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Mais avant de te laisser partir, je vais te demander quelques informations.
en: Right
it: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Sais-tu comment changer tes touches ?
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:...You don’t remember. I see.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Super ! Continuons avec la prochaine question.
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:That is not common... but not unheard of either.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Pour changer tes touches, appuie sur la touche F1 à tout moment après cette introduction !
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Do you at least recall your name?:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tu pourras alors modifier tes contrôles comme bon te semble.
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:\n[1]... is that what you call yourself?:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Passons à la question suivante.
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:And you are certain of it?:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Quelle est l'apparence qui te définit le mieux ?
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:You collapsed not far from Holtheim, along the outer paths.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Se desplomó no muy lejos de Holtheim, en los caminos exteriores.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?

fr: Gauche
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Few travelers pass through here... and fewer still arrive alone.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: Left
de: Left
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Pocos viajeros pasan por aquí... y menos aún llegan solos.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: Left
kana: Left

fr: Droite
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Fewer without a Critter.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: Right
de: Right
ko: Right
kana: Right

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Pour finir, quel est ton nom ?
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:...:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1] ? C'est un très beau nom !\nlJe l'ai bien écrit ?
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Take this journal.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tout est bon, jeune Maker !
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:If your memories do return, it may help you keep them in order.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Si sus recuerdos regresan, le ayudará a ponerlos en orden.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tu vas pouvoir expérimenter cette démo et découvrir les fonctionnalités de CritterSDK !
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Rest for now, \n[1].:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of CritterSDK!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of CritterSDK!
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of CritterSDK!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of CritterSDK!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Amuse-toi bien !
en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:Holtheim is quiet. You will not be disturbed here.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Holtheim es un lugar tranquilo. No será molestado aquí.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!

en: :[name=Elder Theodrin]:When you are ready, we will see about getting you a Critter.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
es: :[name=Anciano Theodrin]:Cuando esté listo, veremos cómo conseguirle un Critter.:[bloop_sound=voice_asgore,100,100]:
